ModMetaData.name: Despicable 2 (NSFW)
ModMetaData.author: DCSzar
ModMetaData.description: Despicable 2 (NSFW) is the adult-only add-on for Despicable 2 (Core). It adds explicit intimacy content with additional animations, sound, expressions, and extra rendering features. Separated from Core by design. Requires Despicable 2 (Core). 18+ only.
